info.description: This is the backend API for E-Commerce platform
info.title: E-Commerce API

put.description: Update the status of an order (Admin only)

post.description: Request a password reset token to be sent to email
Authenticate user and return JWT token
Register a new user with name, email, and password

get.description: Get the current user's shopping cart

delete.description: Remove all items from the current user's cart

post.description: Add a new item or increase quantity of an existing item in the cart

put.description: Update the quantity of a specific item in the cart

delete.description: Remove a specific item from the cart

get.description: Get a list of all product categories

post.description: Create a new product category. Requires admin role.

get.description: Get a product category by ID

put.description: Update an existing product category. Requires admin role.

get.description: Get a paginated list of orders for the authenticated user

post.description: Creates an order from the current user's shopping cart. Will fail if cart is empty or stock is insufficient.

get.description: Get specific order details by ID

put.description: Cancel an order that is still in pending status

get.description: Browse and search products with optional filters and pagination

post.description: Create a new product in the catalog. Requires admin role.

put.description: Update an existing product. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Delete a product. Requires admin role.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
